payload.title: Connect flow can CREATE a new remote project from a local workspace
payload.description: Since hosted has no create button, the local connect flow must let you push a local workspace UP as a NEW remote project (create project on the hub from this board), in addition to joining an existing project. Resolves the chicken-and-egg: the first project is born from a local connect. Wire: connect modal offers 'create new project' (name) -> createProjectBoard on the hub + bind + initial push; or 'join existing' (picker).
